hero.subheadline: Connect with verified caregivers and licensed agencies. Bringing transparency, safety, and peace of mind to home healthcare across Bangladesh.

stats.title: Trusted by Thousands Across Bangladesh
stats.description: Our platform connects families, caregivers, and agencies with transparency and safety

valueProps.title: Why Choose CareNet?
valueProps.description: Discover the benefits that make us Bangladesh's most trusted caregiving platform

prop1.title: Verified Caregivers
prop1.description: Every caregiver undergoes a rigorous 6-step verification process including police clearance, certificate verification, and health checks.

prop2.title: Real-Time Monitoring
prop2.description: Track caregiver check-ins, care logs, and vital updates as they happen. Complete visibility into your loved one's care.

prop3.title: Licensed Agency Network
prop3.description: Access Bangladesh's top-rated care agencies, all vetted for compliance and reliability. Compare bids with confidence.

prop4.title: Integrated Platform
prop4.description: Everything in one place—search, book, schedule, communicate, pay, and track. No more juggling multiple apps.

prop5.title: Offline-First Technology
prop5.description: Care logs and check-ins save locally when there's no internet, syncing automatically when reconnected.

prop6.title: Bilingual Support
prop6.description: Full English and Bangla language support throughout the platform, with intelligent auto-detection.

prop7.title: Secure Payments
prop7.description: Pay securely through bKash, Nagad, Rocket, or credit card—all integrated with escrow protection.

targetAudience.title: Who Is CareNet For?
targetAudience.description: Our platform serves every participant in the care journey with tailored experiences

guardians.title: For Guardians & Families
guardians.subtitle: Find the perfect care for your loved ones
guardians.description: Find and book verified caregivers for your loved ones. Post care requirements, review agency proposals, track care in real-time, and manage payments—all from one app.

caregivers.title: For Caregivers
caregivers.subtitle: Build your career in caregiving
caregivers.description: Discover jobs posted by agencies across Bangladesh. Build your portfolio, track earnings, log care digitally, and grow your career with our training portal.

agencies.title: For Care Agencies
agencies.subtitle: Streamline your operations
agencies.description: Streamline your entire operation—manage caregivers, respond to care requirements, monitor shifts, automate payroll, and track performance from a single dashboard.

shops.title: For Shop Owners
shops.subtitle: Reach healthcare customers
shops.description: Sell healthcare products to the families and caregivers who need them. Manage inventory, track orders, and grow your revenue through our integrated marketplace.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.description: Real stories from families, caregivers, and agencies using CareNet across Bangladesh

t1.name: Fatima K.
t1.quote: Finding reliable care for my elderly mother was overwhelming until I found CareNet. The verification process gave me peace of mind, and the real-time tracking lets me check on her care anytime. The platform is easy to use, and the support team is always responsive.

t2.name: Mohammad R.
t2.quote: CareNet transformed my career. I can find jobs that match my skills and location, track my earnings transparently, and build a verified portfolio. The offline feature is a lifesaver when working in areas with poor internet.

t3.name: Rahman H.
t3.quote: Managing 50+ caregivers used to be a nightmare of spreadsheets and phone calls. CareNet centralized everything—shift scheduling, payroll, client communication, and performance tracking. Our operational efficiency increased by 40%.

trustSafety.title: Your Safety Is Our Priority
trustSafety.description: Comprehensive verification and protection for peace of mind

1.title: Certificate Verification
1.description: Educational and professional certificates verified against issuing institutions

2.title: Police Clearance Check
2.description: Criminal background verification through Bangladesh Police

3.title: Health Screening
3.description: Medical fitness certification for caregiving work

4.title: Psychological Assessment
4.description: Mental health and emotional stability evaluation

5.title: In-Person Interview
5.description: Face-to-face assessment by CareNet team members

6.title: Final Approval & Monitoring
6.description: Comprehensive review and ongoing performance monitoring

1.title: Agency-Mediated Safety
1.description: All caregivers are placed through licensed, verified agencies

2.title: Data Privacy & Security
2.description: Row-level security, MFA, and encrypted data protection

3.title: 24/7 Support
3.description: Round-the-clock support via phone, WhatsApp, and email

trustSafety.badgeDescription: Every caregiver on our platform undergoes complete verification

footerCTA.title: Still have questions?
footerCTA.description: Our support team is here to help you get the most out of CareNet.
footerCTA.trustText: No credit card required • Free to get started • Cancel anytime
